name: Conger (SS-477)
events: 15 Apr 1945 USS Conger (Lt.Cdr. H.D. Sipple, USN) arrived at Newport, Rhode Island from Portsmouth, New Hampshire to conduct torpedo trials.
18 Apr 1945 Having completed her torpedo trials, USS Conger (Lt.Cdr. H.D. Sipple, USN), arrived at New London, Connecticut.
11 May 1945 USS Conger (Lt.Cdr. H.D. Sipple, USN) departed New London, Connecticut for Bar Harbour, Maine to conduct torpedo firing tests.
12 May 1945 USS Conger (Lt.Cdr. H.D. Sipple, USN) arrived at Bar Harbour, Maine to conduct torpedo firing tests.
13 May 1945 USS Conger (Lt.Cdr. H.D. Sipple, USN) arrived back at New London, Connecticut.

21 Jul 1945 With her trials and initial training completed USS Conger (Lt.Cdr. H.D. Sipple, USN) departed from New London bound for Pearl Harbor. She was en-route from Balboa (Panama Canal Zone) to Pearl Harbor when hostilities ended.
21 Jul 1945 USS Conger (Lt.Cdr. H.D. Sipple, USN) departed New London, Connecticut for the Panama Canal Zone.
30 Jul 1945 USS Conger (Lt.Cdr. H.D. Sipple, USN) arrived in the Panama Canal Zone from New London, Connecticut.
13 Aug 1945 USS Conger (Lt.Cdr. H.D. Sipple, USN) departed the Panama Canal Zone for Pearl Harbor.
24 Aug 1945 USS Conger (Lt.Cdr. H.D. Sipple, USN) returned to the Panama Canal Zone. With the war now over she was ordered to return to the Atlantic.
31 Aug 1945 USS Conger (Lt.Cdr. H.D. Sipple, USN) departed the Panama Canal Zone for Key West, Florida.
4 Sep 1945 USS Conger (Lt.Cdr. H.D. Sipple, USN) arrived at Key West, Florida from the Panama Canal Zone.
